---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, role, verification method, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

A clear description of the feature.

## Why it's useful

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## How it could work

Sketch the design. For protocol-level changes, please reference relevant sections of `docs/spec.md`.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you thought about? Why is this better?

## Type of change

- [ ] New role or verification method (Minor change — 14-day public comment)
- [ ] New SDK or framework integration (PR welcome, no comment period)
- [ ] Protocol change (Major change — 30-day public comment + 6-month migration window)
- [ ] Documentation improvement (no comment period)
- [ ] UX/UI change on the website
- [ ] Other:
